scripts.cf:deploy: NITRO_PRESET=cloudflare_module nuxt build && npx wrangler --cwd .output deploy && node scripts/sync-wrangler-ids.mjs && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply fanfare-db --remote
scripts.cf:staging: NITRO_PRESET=cloudflare_module nuxt build && node scripts/inject-wrangler-env.mjs && npx wrangler deploy --config .output/server/wrangler.json --env staging && node scripts/sync-wrangler-ids.mjs && node scripts/inject-wrangler-env.mjs && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply fanfare-staging-db --env staging --remote && pnpm db:seed:staging
scripts.db:migrate: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply fanfare-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:prod: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply fanfare-db --remote
scripts.db:migrate:staging: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply fanfare-staging-db --env staging --remote
